changes: Added `shown_empty_hint` boolean state variable to track hint display (line 46)
Refactored pending directory iteration: converted iterator to Vec with upfront filtering (lines 89-101)
Consolidated filter logic: moved `.bop` extension and directory checks before loop
Added empty state detection with one-time hint emission (lines 103-106)
Hint message: '[dispatcher] Nothing pending. Try: bop new <template> <id>' sent to stderr
file_insights.impact: Non-breaking enhancement; improves UX by guiding users when no work is queued

patterns_discovered.description: Uses `shown_empty_hint` boolean to ensure hint displays exactly once per dispatcher session, avoiding spam in long-running process
Converts iterator to Vec, applies all filters upfront, then processes - enables emptiness check and cleaner loop body
Replaces multiple inline `continue` statements with declarative filter predicates in `filter()` closure

gotchas_discovered.issue: Hint state persists across loop iterations
gotchas_discovered.detail: `shown_empty_hint` flag is never reset, so hint only appears once during entire dispatcher lifetime - appropriate for long-running daemon
Hint sent via `eprintln!` (stderr) rather than `println!` - may be less visible to users, but keeps stderr clean of card processing logs
Filter checks for `.bop` extension - indicates cards must have `.jobcard.bop` suffix or similar

approach_details.root_cause_fix: Direct feature implementation without prior bugs discovered

recommendations.suggestion: Consider time-based throttling: show hint every N minutes if queue remains empty, rather than just once per session
Verify hint reaches users: `eprintln!` writes to stderr - confirm dispatcher logs pipe stderr to visible output in typical deployment
Add test case covering empty pending directory to verify hint is shown exactly once
Document that `bop new <template> <id>` is the canonical way to create work items - hint teaches users discovery path
